nasb.text: Then Moses spoke to the heads of the tribes of the sons of Israel, saying, “This is the word which the Lord has commanded.

esv.text: Moses spoke to the heads of the tribes of the people of Israel, saying, “This is what the Lord has commanded.

cnv.text: 摩西告訴以色列人眾支派的領袖：“這是耶和華吩咐的話：

ccb.text: 摩西对以色列各支派的首领说：“以下是耶和华的吩咐。
